title: regex cache key coupling undocumented
description: cache_pattern() in lib.rs inserts compiled regexes keyed by the full anchored string (e.g. '(?s)\A(?:pat)\z' or '(?i)(?s)\A(?:pat)\z'). str_matches_regex_pat() looks up entries using the same construction. This coupling — that the lookup key must be reconstructed to the exact same format as the insertion key — is not documented anywhere. A maintainer changing the anchoring scheme in one function would silently break the other. A comment on cache_pattern() or str_matches_regex_pat() should explain the key format contract.
